## What does this change?

A short description of the change and why it is needed. If it fixes an issue, link it here, for example, "Fixes #123".

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or improvement
- [ ] Documentation or guide update
- [ ] Other, please describe

## How was this tested?

If you changed a script, say which Raspberry Pi model and OS version you
tested on. If you changed the guide, confirm the steps and table of contents
still line up.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` if the change affects users
- [ ] Shell script changes pass ShellCheck where practical
- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
